phase1.title: Collapse Panel
phase1.content:
Tap the arrow to collapse the connection panel
Make room for the node list

phase2.title: Expand Panel
phase2.content:
Tap the arrow again to expand the panel
Restore the connection buttons

phase3.title: Send Feedback
phase3.content:
Having issues? Tap this button
to submit feedback anytime

phase4.title: Invite Friends
phase4.content:
Tap here to open the invite page
Both you and your friend get free time

phase5.title: Share with Friends
phase5.content:
Tap the share button
to send the invite link to friends

phase6.title: Back to Dashboard
phase6.content:
Tap here to return to the dashboard
Select a node to connect
